hero.subheadline: We build AI-powered software that helps teams automate operations, integrate tools, and make faster decisions with reliable data.

about.title: Built to Transform How Businesses Operate
about.mission: Our mission is to architect the transition towards autonomous operations. At DYNX Labs, we transform manual workflows into scalable digital infrastructures, enabling artificial intelligence to be the engine of business performance.

services.title: Core Capabilities
services.description: We design and deploy intelligent systems tailored to your tech stack that scale with your company.

ai.title: AI Agents

workflow.description: We eliminate repetitive processes by connecting your current tools to create autonomous and efficient workflows.

method.title: Discovery to Scale
method.subtitle: A systematic approach to transforming manual operations into intelligent, autonomous systems.
method.step1Description: Comprehensive audit of your current workflows to identify bottlenecks and automation opportunities specific to your industry.
method.step2Description: Architecture of a custom AI solution, selecting optimal technologies and defining integration points with your existing tech stack.
method.step3Description: Deployment of production-ready solutions with comprehensive testing, staff training, and 24/7 monitoring to ensure immediate operational efficiency.

trust.title: Built Different
trust.agileDesc: As an efficient team, we move fast and adapt to your needs without corporate bureaucracy.
trust.aiFirstDesc: Artificial intelligence is not an accessory — it is embedded in every solution we architect.
trust.secureDesc: Security is not an additional layer — it is built into every layer of our architecture.
trust.partnersDesc: We get directly involved in your success. Your growth is the engine of ours.

stack.title: Technologies We Build With
stack.description: We combine the world's most capable AI models with cloud infrastructure and battle-tested tools to deliver production-ready automation systems.
stack.aiDescription: We orchestrate the world's most capable AI models — selecting the right one per task.
stack.backendDescription: Python is our core language for AI pipelines, automation scripts, and APIs.
stack.cloudDescription: We deploy on AWS and Google Cloud — enterprise-grade reliability from day one.

cookie.text: We use essential cookies to ensure you get the best experience on our website. By continuing, you agree to our

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.section1Content: We collect data provided directly by you — name, email, and messages. We do not use tracking cookies or collect personal data without explicit consent.
privacy.section2Content: Your information is used exclusively to respond to inquiries, provide contracted services, and communicate about active projects. We do not sell or share your data with third parties under any circumstances.
privacy.section3Content: Our solutions integrate AI models from world leaders — Anthropic, OpenAI, and Google — and cloud infrastructure from AWS and Google Cloud. These services operate under their respective privacy policies.
privacy.section4Content: You have the right to request access to, correction of, or deletion of your personal information at any time by contacting us directly.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.section1Content: DYNX Labs provides automation software and workflow integration services. The scope and deliverables of each engagement are defined individually through a project agreement signed prior to commencement.
terms.section2Content: Upon full payment, the client owns all final project deliverables. DYNX Labs retains full ownership of its proprietary methodologies, frameworks, and internal tooling used during development.
terms.section3Content: We treat all client business processes, data structures, and operational information as strictly confidential. This obligation remains in effect indefinitely beyond the conclusion of any engagement.
terms.section4Content: Total liability for any claim arising from our services is limited to the amount paid by the client for the specific contracted service giving rise to that claim.

faq.pageSubtitle: Everything you need to know before getting started.
faq.a1: Every business has different complexity — a fixed price list would be doing you a disservice. After a free 45-minute discovery session where we map your workflows and goals in detail, we deliver a tailored proposal. Most automation projects for small and mid-size businesses fall between $500–$5,000 USD depending on scope and integrations.
faq.q2: Do you offer phased payment structures?
faq.a2: Yes. For larger projects we structure payments in milestones: a portion upfront to begin, another at mid-point delivery, and the final payment upon successful deployment. You only pay for results you can see and validate.
faq.q3: How long does a full implementation take?
faq.a3: Simple automations — like connecting two tools or eliminating a repetitive task — can be live in 1 to 2 weeks. Complex systems with multiple integrations and custom AI agents typically take 3 to 6 weeks. We always begin with a focused discovery phase so there are zero surprises on either side.
faq.q4: What does the discovery phase actually look like?
faq.a4: It is a structured deep-dive into your operations. We map every workflow, identify bottlenecks, and quantify the time your team is losing to manual tasks. By the end, you have a clear picture of your automation opportunities — regardless of whether you move forward with us.
faq.q5: Does our team need technical knowledge to operate the systems?
faq.a5: None whatsoever. Every system we build is designed for the people who will actually use it — not for engineers. You get clean dashboards, simple interfaces, full documentation, and hands-on training. If your team can use a spreadsheet, they can run what we build.
faq.q6: Can you integrate with the tools we already use?
faq.a6: In the vast majority of cases, yes. We work with the most common business ecosystems — Google Workspace, Notion, Airtable, Shopify, WhatsApp, QuickBooks, Slack, and many others. During discovery we audit your current stack and confirm compatibility before committing to a single line of code.
faq.q7: How do you handle our business data and processes?
faq.a7: Every engagement operates under strict confidentiality. Your workflows, data structures, and business logic are never shared, repurposed, or referenced outside your project. We treat your operational knowledge as the competitive asset it is.
faq.q8: What happens after the project is delivered?
faq.a8: Every project includes a 30-day post-launch support period at no additional cost. We monitor systems, resolve edge cases, and make adjustments as your team settles in. Beyond that, we offer ongoing maintenance plans for businesses that want a long-term technical partner — not just a vendor.

products.title: In Development
products.subtitle: We are building a suite of AI-native products designed to automate the operations most businesses run manually today. Each one production-ready, battle-tested, and built to scale.
products.p1Desc: An AI operations hub that monitors your workflows, detects bottlenecks in real time, and dispatches automated responses — without human intervention.
products.p2Desc: A real-time business intelligence dashboard that pulls data from all your tools, surfaces critical KPIs, and generates automated executive summaries powered by LLMs.
products.p3Desc: A no-code integration layer that connects your existing tools — CRM, ERP, communication platforms — into a single unified data pipeline with zero friction.
products.notifyHint: Be the first to know when we launch.

comingSoon.subtitle: We are working on something worth waiting for.
